title: Requires camps and youth sports programs have at least one automated external defibrillator; requires camps and youth sports programs to use best efforts to have at least one person trained to use such defibrillators at camps, games and practices.
description: Requires camps and youth sports programs have at least one automated external defibrillator; requires camps and youth sports programs to use best efforts to have at least one person trained to use such defibrillators at camps, games and practices.

title: Requires camps and youth sports programs to establish an automated external defibrillator implementation plan; requires camps and youth sports programs to have at least one person trained to use such defibrillators at camps, games and practices.
description: Requires camps and youth sports programs to establish an automated external defibrillator implementation plan; requires camps and youth sports programs to have at least one person trained to use such defibrillators at camps, games and practices.

title: This bill would remove barriers to AED use by allowing persons to operate an AED other than as part of their employment, who act in good faith and with reasonable care, and without expectation of monetary compensation, even if they were not trained i...
description: This bill would remove barriers to AED use by allowing persons to operate an AED other than as part of their employment, who act in good faith and with reasonable care, and without expectation of monetary compensation, even if they were not trained i...

title: Requires nonpublic schools provide and maintain on-site automatic external defibrillator (AED) equipment on school grounds and assure that AED equipment is available for off-site curricular events, extracurricular events or school-sponsored athletic ...
description: Requires nonpublic schools provide and maintain on-site automatic external defibrillator (AED) equipment on school grounds and assure that AED equipment is available for off-site curricular events, extracurricular events or school-sponsored athletic ...

title: Relates to requiring certain public school facilities to retain on premises at least one functional cardiac automated external defibrillator, in relation to naming such act the "Louis Acompora AED's in schools act".
description: Relates to requiring certain public school facilities to retain on premises at least one functional cardiac automated external defibrillator, in relation to naming such act the "Louis Acompora AED's in schools act".

title: Requires health clubs with a membership of 50 or more to have at least 1 automated external defibrillator on the premises which is accessible to the staff, members and guests.
description: Requires health clubs with a membership of 50 or more to have at least 1 automated external defibrillator on the premises which is accessible to the staff, members and guests.

title: Requires health clubs to provide automated external defibrillators during business hours when they are staffed.
description: Requires health clubs to provide automated external defibrillators during business hours when they are staffed.

title: Requires schools safety plans to include a cardiac emergency response plan that addresses the use of appropriate personnel and measures to respond to incidents involving any individual experiencing sudden cardiac arrest or similar life-threatening em...
description: Requires schools safety plans to include a cardiac emergency response plan that addresses the use of appropriate personnel and measures to respond to incidents involving any individual experiencing sudden cardiac arrest or similar life-threatening em...

title: Defines epinephrine device as a single-use device or nasal spray device used for the automatic injection or administration of a premeasured dose of epinephrine into the human body for the purpose of emergency treatment of a person appearing to experi...
description: Defines epinephrine device as a single-use device or nasal spray device used for the automatic injection or administration of a premeasured dose of epinephrine into the human body for the purpose of emergency treatment of a person appearing to experi...

title: Requires dental facilities to possess automatic external defibrillators.
description: Requires dental facilities to possess automatic external defibrillators.

title: Relates to the practice of registered dental hygienists.
description: Relates to the practice of registered dental hygienists.

title: Establishes the "Dominic Murray sudden cardiac arrest prevention act"; directs the commissioners of education and health to establish rules and regulations for the treatment and monitoring of students of school districts, boards of cooperative educat...
description: Establishes the "Dominic Murray sudden cardiac arrest prevention act"; directs the commissioners of education and health to establish rules and regulations for the treatment and monitoring of students of school districts, boards of cooperative educat...

title: Allows coaches who cannot be certified in CPR to be able to coach high school sports if there is another coach or staff present at the sporting activity who is certified in CPR.
description: Allows coaches who cannot be certified in CPR to be able to coach high school sports if there is another coach or staff present at the sporting activity who is certified in CPR.

title: Enacts "Briana's law" to require that members of the division of state police and of the police department of the city of New York complete training in cardiopulmonary resuscitation during the police academy and every 2 years thereafter.
description: Enacts "Briana's law" to require that members of the division of state police and of the police department of the city of New York complete training in cardiopulmonary resuscitation during the police academy and every 2 years thereafter.

title: Removes the cardiopulmonary resuscitation report requirement for the division of state police.
description: Removes the cardiopulmonary resuscitation report requirement for the division of state police.

title: Relates to requiring at least one employee at a child day care facility or family day care home to be trained and certified in cardiopulmonary resuscitation and first aid.
description: Relates to requiring at least one employee at a child day care facility or family day care home to be trained and certified in cardiopulmonary resuscitation and first aid.

title: Authorizes nurse practitioners to execute orders not to resuscitate and orders relating to life sustaining treatments.
description: Authorizes nurse practitioners to execute orders not to resuscitate and orders relating to life sustaining treatments.

title: Permits the execution of orders not to resuscitate and orders pertaining to life sustaining treatments by physician assistants.
description: Permits the execution of orders not to resuscitate and orders pertaining to life sustaining treatments by physician assistants.

title: Permits the execution of orders not to resuscitate and orders pertaining to life sustaining treatments by physician assistants.

title: Requires the commissioner of education to make recommendations to the board of regents relating to the adoption of instruction in cardiopulmonary resuscitation and the use of AEDs in senior high schools.
